rawAssistant: I can see you're heading into marsh country, and with that lead beast of yours poisoning, I'd recommend grabbing an Antidote right away. That's a non-negotiable. Don't bother with just any Antidote, either - make sure it's the one specifically designed for poison afflictions. You'll also want to stock up on some Cold Salve and Shock Tonic, just in case things get hairy.
